title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
summary_full: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.
summary_public: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU
